analysis.summary: The song chronicles a journey from deep struggle and darkness into triumphant resilience, transforming personal pressure and pain into pure golden success through relentless creation.

sections.name: Intro
sections.emotion: Brooding anticipation shifting to explosive energy

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.emotion: Heavy burden turning into rising defiance

sections.name: Chorus
sections.emotion: Soaring vocal release with unshakeable resolve

sections.name: Bridge
sections.emotion: Philosophical epiphany culminating in total mastery of the self

sections.name: Drop
sections.emotion: Maximum intensity brass-heavy climax with pure golden realization

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.emotion: Cool-headed reflection on rejecting external validation

sections.name: Pre-Chorus
sections.emotion: Building spiritual heat and atmospheric pressure

keywords.emotion: Intense physical and mental weight transforming into fuel
keywords.imageryPrompt: A heavy, glowing blacksmith hammer striking molten gold ingot inside a dark forge with sparks flying in slow motion.

keywords.emotion: Pure, radiant success reflecting inner worth
keywords.imageryPrompt: Liquid golden metal pouring from cracks in the sky onto cracked earth to form a shimmering river of wealth and light.

keywords.emotion: Deep existential emptiness learning names through struggle
keywords.imageryPrompt: A vast, swirling nebula of deep purple smoke where faint silhouettes stand against an infinite void that slowly ignites with orange embers.

keywords.emotion: Uncontrollable passion burning away fear and doubt
keywords.imageryPrompt: A roaring inferno inside a human chest made of brass gears, flames licking upwards to illuminate a silhouette against a night sky.

keywords.emotion: Hardened resilience sounding like war calls and building blocks
keywords.imageryPrompt: Polished golden-yellow metal structures rising from ash into towering skyscrapers, vibrating with low-frequency sound waves visible as ripples.

keywords.emotion: Beating heart of gold amidst the chaos and pressure
keywords.imageryPrompt: An anatomical heart made entirely of spinning golden coins beating rhythmically within a chest cavity surrounded by storm clouds that part to let light through.

keywords.emotion: Proud marks of survival and the path climbed higher
keywords.imageryPrompt: A warrior's arm where jagged silver scars glow with warm amber light, transforming from wounds into intricate maps of a mountain climb.

keywords.emotion: The dark place before dawn and the start of creation
keywords.imageryPrompt: A bottomless pit filled with floating debris that slowly coalesces into stars as a single beam of sunlight pierces through from above.

styleHint: A mid-tempo (96 BPM) F-minor track blending gritty trap drums with atmospheric synth pads and warm basslines that build from a brooding void into an explosive, brass-heavy climax where the vocal delivery shifts between Spanish melodic hooks and aggressive English verses about turning struggle into gold.
